required_preferences.fact: Preps her cat’s medication and subcutaneous fluids immediately after breakfast and before dinner — routine now includes two distinct caregiving sessions each day

supersedes.fact: Preps her cat’s medication immediately after breakfast — never before

required_preferences.fact: Blocks all work-related notifications on her phone after 8pm—no exceptions, including deployment emergencies—to comply with strict sleep routine for managing sleep apnea

supersedes.fact: Restricts all work-related notifications on her phone after 8pm, except for deployment emergencies

required_preferences.fact: Shops for groceries exclusively at neighborhood co-ops — never uses large supermarkets or delivery apps
Uses meal delivery only during high-stress sprints — otherwise insists on cooking fresh at home
Sets an alarm for 8:45pm as a hard cutoff for all screen use—including television and mobile devices—transitioning directly to offline relaxation to prepare for CPAP use
Maintains a dedicated weekly one-on-one check-in with every backend team lead to provide individual support and monitor cross-team progress.

persona: A mid-career backend developer at a fintech startup
